project_common.art_style: 8-bit pixel art, retro minimalist aesthetic inspired by Google Chrome offline game
project_common.rendering: pixel perfect rendering with no anti-aliasing

shared_attributes.style: 8-bit pixel art with sharp, dangerous silhouette
shared_attributes.shading: flat color, no gradients or shading
shared_attributes.movement: scrolls left at current game speed

context.role: Ground obstacle requiring player to jump, wider than small variant
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=650px (screen_width + 50), y=0px (ground level), scrolls left
context.usage_scenario: Common obstacle appearing from game start, requires same jump height as small but wider hitbox

visual_specification.shape: Two vertical cacti placed side by side forming a group, both same height
visual_specification.texture: solid pixel art, no texture patterns
visual_specification.details: Two cacti with slight spacing between them, each with horizontal spikes, same vertical height as cactus_small (70px), combined width approximately double

relationships.shared_with: Same height (70px) and color as cactus_small, same style as all cactus variants
relationships.differences_from: cactus_small is 34px wide (single), cactus_large is 102x100px (triple and taller)

explicit_negations: No flowers, fruits, or decorative elements
Not merged into single cactus - must show two distinct cacti
Not different heights - both cacti same 70px height
